missing.description: Enforces HTTPS connections. Prevents protocol downgrade attacks and cookie hijacking.
Controls resources the browser is allowed to load. Mitigates XSS and data injection.
missing.recommendation: Add a CSP policy. Start with: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'

missing.description: Prevents clickjacking by controlling whether the page can be embedded in frames.
missing.recommendation: Add: X-Frame-Options: DENY  (or SAMEORIGIN if framing is needed internally)

missing.description: Prevents MIME-type sniffing. Stops browsers from interpreting files as a different MIME type.
Controls how much referrer information is included with requests.
Controls browser features and APIs (camera, mic, geolocation, etc.).
Controls caching behavior. Sensitive pages should not be cached.
missing.recommendation: For sensitive pages: Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate

missing.description: Legacy XSS filter (deprecated in modern browsers, but still checked by some scanners).
missing.recommendation: Add: X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block  (Note: CSP is the modern replacement)

leaking.description: Reveals server software and version. Consider removing or obscuring.
